query: 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage red cards results so far June 2026
answer: The research is complete, though with significant limitations. All web-access tools were unavailable, so I could not retrieve the actual red card data from the ongoing 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage. The report includes the known tournament context (48 teams, started June 11, 2026) and historical red card benchmarks from prior World Cups for reference. I recommend re-running this query when web tools are restored to get the specific player-level red card data.
key_facts: The 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage began on June 11, 2026, in Canada, Mexico, and the United States.
As of June 16, 2026, approximately 5 days of group stage matches have been played.
This is the first 48-team World Cup (expanded from 32), with 12 groups of 4 teams.
UNABLE TO RETRIEVE: Specific red card data for the 2026 World Cup group stage — all web search and fetch tools were unavailable.
Historical reference: 2022 World Cup had 4 group stage red cards; 2018 had 1; 2014 had 7.
